examples.desc: A minimal template demonstrating the core .fgblc structure: ICT order blocks, technical indicators, and time features across 6 columns. Use this as a starting point for your own configuration.

A complete feature vector (35 columns) combining ICT order blocks, technical indicators (AD, RSI, VIDYA, StdDev), economic news event flags, and time-based features. Production-ready for flat ML models.

A Matrix configuration generating a 5-row x 3-column rolling context window using @New Matrix with auto-generated indices (#Generate). Each row represents one bar of history. Ideal for LSTM or Transformer-based models.
